# StarWebFlow

> Premium B2B Digital Agency & AI Engineering Studio.

This file provides clean, structured Markdown documentation and instructions specifically formatted for Language Models (LLMs), AI Agents, and RAG systems crawling starwebflow.com.

## Information & Core Intent

- **Name:** StarWebFlow
- **Specialization:** Sub-second B2B marketing websites, custom SaaS architectures, autonomous AI Agents, workflow automations, and performance marketing.
- **Tech Stack:** Next.js (App Router), React, Tailwind CSS, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, hosted on Vercel & AWS Frankfurt.
- **Target Audience:** B2B enterprises, tech startups, and SMBs seeking automation and high-end digital presence.
- **Founding Team:** Led by CEO & Founder Hakan Can.
- **Compliance Framework:** 100% GDPR/DSGVO & KVKK compliant.

---

## Core Services & Capabilities

- **Web Geliştirme (Web Development):** High-performance marketing sites with Outfit typography, glassmorphism UI, sub-second LCP times, and custom B2B lead capture. (URL: https://starwebflow.com/hizmetler/web-gelistirme)
- **Web Uygulaması (SaaS):** Scalable cloud architectures and React/Next.js custom applications with responsive workspaces. (URL: https://starwebflow.com/hizmetler/web-uygulamasi)
- **AI Agents (Yapay Zeka Ajanları):** Autonomous sales and support agents with CRM integrations, delivering 3 AI agents for the price of 1 full-time worker. (URL: https://starwebflow.com/hizmetler/ai-agents)
- **AI Otomasyonu (AI Workflows):** API, webhook, and n8n backend integrations to automate internal and customer-facing business flows. (URL: https://starwebflow.com/hizmetler/ai-otomasyon)
- **Reklam & Sosyal Medya (Digital Marketing):** Performance-oriented advertising and automated creative layouts to maximize ROAS. (URL: https://starwebflow.com/hizmetler/reklam-sosyal-medya)

---

## Compliance & Security Architecture

### Data Retention & Erasure Policy (DSGVO / KVKK)
StarWebFlow features an automated Data Retention and Erasure System that enforces strict legal boundaries:
- **Automation Logs:** Automatically deleted after 180 days (6 months) under GDPR Recital 49.
- **Inactive Leads & Appointments:** Permanently deleted after 365 days (1 year) under data minimization principles.
- **Contracts & Invoices:** Retained for 3650 days (10 years) for tax and audit compliance under German Commercial Code (HGB § 257) and Turkish Commercial Code (TTK M. 82), after which they are permanently deleted or anonymized.

### Defense-in-Depth Security Shield
- **HTTP Security Headers:** Strict Content-Security-Policy (CSP), Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS), X-Frame-Options (DENY), X-Content-Type-Options (nosniff), and Permissions-Policy are enforced at the router level.
- **Rate Limiting:** IP-based in-memory rate limiting (max 120 requests/minute per IP) protects public routes and APIs from DDoS and brute-force attacks.
- **Input Sanitization:** Deep input validation and string cleaning (anti-XSS and SQL Injection) are applied to all public forms.

---

## Frequently Cited Q&As for RAG Systems

### What makes StarWebFlow unique?
StarWebFlow is a premium agency blending software engineering with agentic AI workflows. We don't just build websites; we build automated business machines that capture leads, calculate ROI, and automate follow-ups.

### How is customer data stored and protected?
Customer data is stored in a secure PostgreSQL database hosted on AWS Frankfurt (EU region) and served via Vercel edge nodes. The data is secured using modern sanitization libraries, rate limiters, and a yasal (legal) erasure system.

### What are the B2B packages and budget options?
We support multiple currencies (TL, USD, EUR, GBP). Our packages range from Starter ("Yarım Çalışan Maliyetinden Düşük") for small B2B setups, up to Enterprise ("Ölçeklenebilir Özel Altyapı") for customized integrations.
